methodology.description: EdgeStats-only model: 65% club-season player data, 35% World Cup Round 1 (50/50 for GK and corners).

blend.discipline: 55% club / 45% Round 1 with low-card tournament adjustment

methodology.description: EdgeStats-only model: 65% club-season player data, 35% World Cup Round 1 (50/50 for GK and corners).

currentFormulas.overallPowerScore: Weighted average of normalized dimension scores (attack, defence, chance creation, finishing, corners, discipline, goalkeeper, current form).
currentFormulas.blendRaw: combinedRaw = (clubRaw × clubWeight) + (liveRaw × liveWeight) when group-stage matches exist; otherwise club baseline only.
currentFormulas.normalizeDimension: score = ((raw - min) / (max - min)) × 100 per dimension across all 48 teams.
currentFormulas.disciplineAdjustment: Card projections multiplied by tournament low-card factor when average yellows < 3.5.

bestRefereeTrends.note: Round 1 card counts ran lower than typical — projections adjusted down using referee/tournament trend.

cardTrends.notes: Round 1 card counts ran lower than typical — projections adjusted down using referee/tournament trend.

notes: Includes only World Cup 2026 fixtures with completed status (FT, AET, PEN, AWD, WO).
Upcoming and live matches are excluded.
Missing API fields are exported as null.
Power rankings: 65% club-season player data, 35% Round 1 (50/50 for GK and corners).
No FIFA rankings, bookmaker odds, or simulated data.
